ASBESTOS MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-24-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE IN SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36(A) AND (D). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 9/22/08 @ 11:15AM IN DEPT. 206. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO GO TO DEPT. 220 TO SCHEDULE A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLAINTIFF TO SEND NOTICE. G.O. 140 RE: MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS STIPULATED TO. THE COURT ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFF SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL IDENTIFICATION AND LAY WITNESSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS THAT SUPPORT THEIR TESTIMONY, AS TO EACH INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT BY 25 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT ALL DEFENDANTS SHALL DISCLOSE THE NAMES AND ADDRESSES OF ALL LAY WITNESSES THAT THE INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANT LEARNED OF THROUGH ITS OWN DISCOVERY EFFORTS AND THAT WILL SUPPORT PROPOSITION 51 PURPOSES OR FOR THEIR AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES, AND PRODUCE ANY DOCUMENTS UPON WHICH THESE WITNESSES SUPPORT, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT BY 45 DAYS AFTER THE GRANTING OF PREFERENCE. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE: JAMES MCBRIDE; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: SUSAN LEE #4280.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Acuna of Brayton Purcell (898.1555) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter.
